title: indigofera helmsii
intro: Indigofera helmsii, also known as Helms' Indigo or Australian Indigo, is a plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family, native to Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. It is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Indigofera helmsii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, and is also used in topical applications, such as creams and ointments.
